# CVPixelFormatDescription.PixelLayout

**Structure**

Defines pixel layout of a buffer plane or the entire buffer if the format is non-planar.

## Declaration

```swift
struct PixelLayout
```

## Overview

Note: The value of [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelFormatDescription/PixelLayout/fillExtendedPixels] property is ignored when comparing two pixel layouts for equality.

## Initializers

- **init(blockSize:bitsPerBlock:bitsPerComponent:blockAlignment:subsampling:blackBlock:fillExtendedPixels:cgBitmapInfo:)**

## Instance Properties

- **bitsPerBlock**: Number of bits per pixel. If [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelFormatDescription/PixelLayout/blockSize] is greater than (1, 1) then this represents bits per block.
- **bitsPerComponent**: The logical bit depth of each component of the plane.
- **blackBlock**: The bit pattern for a block of black pixels.  If absent, black is assumed to be all zeros. Otherwise, this should be [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelFormatDescription/PixelLayout/bitsPerBlock] bits long. If bitsPerBlock is less than a byte, repeat the bit pattern for the full byte.
- **blockAlignment**: Alignment requirements on block multiples. v210 would be (8, 1) here for the horizontal case, to match the standard v210 row alignment value of 48.
- **blockSize**: Used to assist with allocating memory for pixel formats that don’t have an integer value for bytes per pixel. Block width/height is essentially the width/height in pixels of the smallest “byte addressable” group of pixels. This works in close conjunction with [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelFormatDescription/PixelLayout/bitsPerBlock]. Examples: 8-bit luminance only, blockSize.width would be 1, bitsPerBlock would be 8 16-bit 1555 RGB, blockSize.width would be 1, bitsPerBlock would be 16 32-bit 8888 ARGB, blockSize.width would be 1, bitsPerBlock would be 32 2vuy (CbYCrY), blockSize.width would be 2, bitsPerBlock would be 32 1-bit bitmap, blockSize.width would be 8, bitsPerBlock would be 8 v210, blockSize.width would be 6, bitsPerBlock would be 128
- **cgBitmapInfo**: CoreGraphics bitmap info used for CG compatibility.
- **fillExtendedPixels**: Callback which can replicate edge pixels to the extended pixels.
- **subsampling**: Pixel subsampling for this plane.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
